cards.title: Knowledge that stacks up
cards.subtitle: Every paper becomes part of your knowledge map

papers.title: Attention Is All You Need
papers.abstract: Proposed the Transformer architecture. Self-attention replaces RNNs.

papers.title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers
papers.abstract: Bidirectional pre-training achieves SOTA across NLP benchmarks.

papers.title: GPT-3: Language Models are Few-Shot Learners
papers.abstract: 175B parameter model demonstrates remarkable few-shot capabilities.

papers.title: Diffusion Models Beat GANs
papers.abstract: Diffusion models surpass GANs in image generation quality.

papers.title: Chain-of-Thought Prompting
papers.abstract: Step-by-step reasoning dramatically improves model performance.

items.desc: When reading papers feels like homework. Get the big picture with prior work maps.
When you need to survey a new field fast. Six layers save you hours.
When you want to keep up with AI papers. Pipelines show you what matters.
When you thought papers weren't for you. Ten minutes a day is enough.

cta.title: We'll build your personal paper map
cta.subtitle: Join as a beta tester and be the first to explore

items.a: All features are free during the beta period.
We start with arXiv and open-access papers, expanding over time.
Currently focused on English papers, but explanations are available in Korean too.

items.q: Can I upload my own PDFs?
items.a: PDF upload will be added after the beta phase.
Personal data is encrypted and only used to improve paper recommendations.
